category_sources: source_facts.description: Wait for a port or a service to enter the requested state; official README describes service-readiness checks for CI/CD, containers, and local development.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: wait4x; official repository README uses Wait4X.
docs_sources: Official wait4x.dev documentation site has a /docs section; official GitHub README provides CLI reference and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/wait4x/wait4x; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies port/service waiting; official README lists TCP, HTTP, DNS, database, message queue, reverse, parallel, and command execution checks.
